    SveDupmZi => Dupm, Sve, "`DUPM <Zd>.<T>, #imm` (SVE broadcast bitmask immediate).";

    // --- SVE integer: arithmetic immediate (`_z_zi_`, unsigned/signed imm8) ---
    SveAddZi => Add, Sve, "`ADD <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveSubZi => Sub, Sve, "`SUB <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveSubrZi => Subr, Sve, "`SUBR <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveSqaddZi => Sqadd, Sve, "`SQADD <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveUqaddZi => Uqadd, Sve, "`UQADD <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveSqsubZi => Sqsub, Sve, "`SQSUB <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveUqsubZi => Uqsub, Sve, "`UQSUB <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE).";
    SveSmaxZi => Smax, Sve, "`SMAX <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveUmaxZi => Umax, Sve, "`UMAX <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveSminZi => Smin, Sve, "`SMIN <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveUminZi => Umin, Sve, "`UMIN <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveMulZi => Mul, Sve, "`MUL <Zdn>.<T>, <Zdn>.<T>, #imm` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE integer: shift by immediate (predicated/unpredicated) ---
    SveAsrZi => Asr, Sve, "`ASR <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE, unpredicated).";
    SveLsrZi => Lsr, Sve, "`LSR <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE, unpredicated).";
    SveLslZi => Lsl, Sve, "`LSL <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE, unpredicated).";
    SveAsrZpzi => Asr, Sve, "`ASR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE).";
    SveLsrZpzi => Lsr, Sve, "`LSR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE).";
    SveLslZpzi => Lsl, Sve, "`LSL <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE).";
    SveAsrdZpzi => Asrd, Sve, "`ASRD <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, #shift` (SVE).";
    SveAsrZpzz => Asr, Sve, "`ASR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveLsrZpzz => Lsr, Sve, "`LSR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveLslZpzz => Lsl, Sve, "`LSL <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveAsrrZpzz => Asrr, Sve, "`ASRR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveLsrrZpzz => Lsrr, Sve, "`LSRR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveLslrZpzz => Lslr, Sve, "`LSLR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveAsrWide => Asr, Sve, "`ASR <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide elements).";
    SveLsrWide => Lsr, Sve, "`LSR <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide elements).";
    SveLslWide => Lsl, Sve, "`LSL <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide elements).";
    SveAsrWidePred => Asr, Sve, "`ASR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide).";
    SveLsrWidePred => Lsr, Sve, "`LSR <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide).";
    SveLslWidePred => Lsl, Sve, "`LSL <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide).";

    // --- SVE integer: reductions (`_r_p_z_`) ---
    SveSaddv => Saddv, Sve, "`SADDV <Dd>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveUaddv => Uaddv, Sve, "`UADDV <Dd>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveSmaxv => Smaxv, Sve, "`SMAXV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveSminv => Sminv, Sve, "`SMINV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveUmaxv => Umaxv, Sve, "`UMAXV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveUminv => Uminv, Sve, "`UMINV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveAndv => Andv, Sve, "`ANDV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveOrv => Orv, Sve, "`ORV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveEorv => Eorv, Sve, "`EORV <V><d>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: MOVPRFX ---
    SveMovprfxZpz => Movprfx, Sve, "`MOVPRFX <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/<ZM>, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE, predicated).";
    SveMovprfxZz => Movprfx, Sve, "`MOVPRFX <Zd>, <Zn>` (SVE, unpredicated).";

    // --- SVE: INDEX ---
    SveIndexImmImm => Index, Sve, "`INDEX <Zd>.<T>, #imm1, #imm2` (SVE).";
    SveIndexIr => Index, Sve, "`INDEX <Zd>.<T>, #imm, <R><m>` (SVE).";
    SveIndexRi => Index, Sve, "`INDEX <Zd>.<T>, <R><n>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveIndexRr => Index, Sve, "`INDEX <Zd>.<T>, <R><n>, <R><m>` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: compare with immediate / vector / wide (`_p_p_z*`) ---
    SveCmpZi => Cmpeq, Sve, "`CMP<cc> <Pd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveCmpZz => Cmpeq, Sve, "`CMP<cc> <Pd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveCmpZw => Cmpeq, Sve, "`CMP<cc> <Pd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.D` (SVE, wide).";

    // --- SVE: INC/DEC by element count (scalar & vector, by pattern) ---
    SveIncDecScalar => Incb, Sve, "`{S,U}{Q}{INC,DEC}<B,H,W,D> <Xdn>{, pattern{, MUL #imm}}` (SVE).";
    SveIncDecVector => Inch, Sve, "`{S,U}{Q}{INC,DEC}<H,W,D> <Zdn>.<T>{, pattern{, MUL #imm}}` (SVE).";
    SveSqIncDecScalarSx => Sqincb, Sve, "`SQ{INC,DEC}<B,H,W,D> <Xdn>, <Wdn>{, pattern{, MUL #imm}}` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: INC/DEC by predicate count ---
    SveIncDecPScalar => Incp, Sve, "`{S,U}{Q}{INC,DEC}P <Xdn>, <Pg>.<T>` (SVE).";
    SveIncDecPVector => Incp, Sve, "`{S,U}{Q}{INC,DEC}P <Zdn>.<T>, <Pg>` (SVE).";
    SveSqIncDecPScalarSx => Sqincp, Sve, "`SQ{INC,DEC}P <Xdn>, <Pg>.<T>, <Wdn>` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: CNTB/H/W/D, CNTP ---
    SveCntElem => Cntb, Sve, "`CNT<B,H,W,D> <Xd>{, pattern{, MUL #imm}}` (SVE).";
    SveCntp => Cntp, Sve, "`CNTP <Xd>, <Pg>, <Pn>.<T>` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: ADDVL / ADDPL / RDVL ---
    SveAddvl => Addvl, Sve, "`ADDVL <Xd|SP>, <Xn|SP>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveAddpl => Addpl, Sve, "`ADDPL <Xd|SP>, <Xn|SP>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveRdvl => Rdvl, Sve, "`RDVL <Xd>, #imm` (SVE).";
    SveAddsvl => Addsvl, Sme, "`ADDSVL <Xd|SP>, <Xn|SP>, #imm` (SME streaming VL).";
    SveAddspl => Addspl, Sme, "`ADDSPL <Xd|SP>, <Xn|SP>, #imm` (SME streaming PL).";
    SveRdsvl => Rdsvl, Sme, "`RDSVL <Xd>, #imm` (SME streaming VL).";

    // --- SVE: DUP / MOV / CPY / SEL / INSR ---
    SveDupImm => Mov, Sve, "`DUP <Zd>.<T>, #imm{, shift}` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveDupScalar => Mov, Sve, "`DUP <Zd>.<T>, <R><n|SP>` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveDupIdx => Mov, Sve, "`DUP <Zd>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>[imm]` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveCpyImmMerge => Cpy, Sve, "`CPY <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/M, #imm{, shift}` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveCpyImmZero => Cpy, Sve, "`CPY <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, #imm{, shift}` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveCpyScalar => Cpy, Sve, "`CPY <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <R><n|SP>` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveCpyVec => Cpy, Sve, "`CPY <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/M, <V><n>` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveSelZpzz => Sel, Sve, "`SEL <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE, alias MOV).";
    SveInsrScalar => Insr, Sve, "`INSR <Zdn>.<T>, <R><m>` (SVE).";
    SveInsrVec => Insr, Sve, "`INSR <Zdn>.<T>, <V><m>` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: ADR (vector form) ---
    SveAdrSameScaled => Adr, Sve, "`ADR <Zd>.<T>, [<Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>{, <mod> #amt}]` (SVE).";
    SveAdrSxtw => Adr, Sve, "`ADR <Zd>.D, [<Zn>.D, <Zm>.D, SXTW{ #amt}]` (SVE).";
    SveAdrUxtw => Adr, Sve, "`ADR <Zd>.D, [<Zn>.D, <Zm>.D, UXTW{ #amt}]` (SVE).";

    // --- SVE: DOT product ---
    SveSdot => Sdot, Sve, "`SDOT <Zda>.<T>, <Zn>.<Tb>, <Zm>.<Tb>` (SVE).";
    SveUdot => Udot, Sve, "`UDOT <Zda>.<T>, <Zn>.<Tb>, <Zm>.<Tb>` (SVE).";
    SveSdotIdx => Sdot, Sve, "`SDOT <Zda>.<T>, <Zn>.<Tb>, <Zm>.<Tb>[idx]` (SVE).";
    SveUdotIdx => Udot, Sve, "`UDOT <Zda>.<T>, <Zn>.<Tb>, <Zm>.<Tb>[idx]` (SVE).";
    SveSdotH => Sdot, Sve2p1, "`SDOT <Zda>.S, <Zn>.H, <Zm>.H` (SVE2.1 2-way dot).";
    SveUdotH => Udot, Sve2p1, "`UDOT <Zda>.S, <Zn>.H, <Zm>.H` (SVE2.1 2-way dot).";
    SveSdotHIdx => Sdot, Sve2p1, "`SDOT <Zda>.S, <Zn>.H, <Zm>.H[idx]` (SVE2.1 2-way dot, indexed).";
    SveUdotHIdx => Udot, Sve2p1, "`UDOT <Zda>.S, <Zn>.H, <Zm>.H[idx]` (SVE2.1 2-way dot, indexed).";
    SveAddptPred => Addpt, Cpa, "`ADDPT <Zdn>.D, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.D, <Zm>.D` (FEAT_CPA/SVE predicated).";
    SveSubptPred => Subpt, Cpa, "`SUBPT <Zdn>.D, <Pg>/M, <Zdn>.D, <Zm>.D` (FEAT_CPA/SVE predicated).";
    SveAddptUnpred => Addpt, Cpa, "`ADDPT <Zd>.D, <Zn>.D, <Zm>.D` (FEAT_CPA/SVE unpredicated).";
    SveSubptUnpred => Subpt, Cpa, "`SUBPT <Zd>.D, <Zn>.D, <Zm>.D` (FEAT_CPA/SVE unpredicated).";
    Addpt => Addpt, Cpa, "`ADDPT <Xd|SP>, <Xn|SP>, <Xm>{, LSL #amt}` (FEAT_CPA scalar).";
    Subpt => Subpt, Cpa, "`SUBPT <Xd|SP>, <Xn|SP>, <Xm>{, LSL #amt}` (FEAT_CPA scalar).";
    Maddpt => Maddpt, Cpa, "`MADDPT <Xd>, <Xn>, <Xm>, <Xa>` (FEAT_CPA scalar).";
    Msubpt => Msubpt, Cpa, "`MSUBPT <Xd>, <Xn>, <Xm>, <Xa>` (FEAT_CPA scalar).";

    // --- FEAT_CMPBR: compare-and-branch (register and immediate) ---
    // Word/doubleword register form `CB<cc> <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` (sf and
    // the reg/imm form recovered from the operands by the encoder). The word
    // spellings shared with the immediate form (gt/hi/eq/ne) reuse one Code.
    Cbgt => Cbgt, Cmpbr, "`CBGT <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` / `CBGT <Wn|Xn>, #imm6, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR).";
    Cbge => Cbge, Cmpbr, "`CBGE <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, register).";
    Cbhi => Cbhi, Cmpbr, "`CBHI <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` / `CBHI <Wn|Xn>, #imm6, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR).";
    Cbhs => Cbhs, Cmpbr, "`CBHS <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, register).";
    Cbeq => Cbeq, Cmpbr, "`CBEQ <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` / `CBEQ <Wn|Xn>, #imm6, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR).";
    Cbne => Cbne, Cmpbr, "`CBNE <Wm|Xm>, <Wn|Xn>, <label>` / `CBNE <Wn|Xn>, #imm6, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR).";
    Cblt => Cblt, Cmpbr, "`CBLT <Wn|Xn>, #imm6, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, immediate).";
    Cblo => Cblo, Cmpbr, "`CBLO <Wn|Xn>, #imm6, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, immediate).";
    // Byte register form `CBB<cc> <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (sf == 0).
    Cbbgt => Cbbgt, Cmpbr, "`CBBGT <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, byte register).";
    Cbbge => Cbbge, Cmpbr, "`CBBGE <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, byte register).";
    Cbbhi => Cbbhi, Cmpbr, "`CBBHI <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, byte register).";
    Cbbhs => Cbbhs, Cmpbr, "`CBBHS <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, byte register).";
    Cbbeq => Cbbeq, Cmpbr, "`CBBEQ <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, byte register).";
    Cbbne => Cbbne, Cmpbr, "`CBBNE <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, byte register).";
    // Halfword register form `CBH<cc> <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (sf == 0).
    Cbhgt => Cbhgt, Cmpbr, "`CBHGT <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, halfword register).";
    Cbhge => Cbhge, Cmpbr, "`CBHGE <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, halfword register).";
    Cbhhi => Cbhhi, Cmpbr, "`CBHHI <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, halfword register).";
    Cbhhs => Cbhhs, Cmpbr, "`CBHHS <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, halfword register).";
    Cbheq => Cbheq, Cmpbr, "`CBHEQ <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, halfword register).";
    Cbhne => Cbhne, Cmpbr, "`CBHNE <Wm>, <Wn>, <label>` (FEAT_CMPBR, halfword register).";

    // --- SVE2: saturating rounding doubling multiply-add high (`_z_zzz_`/`i`) ---
    SveSqrdmlah => Sqrdmlah, Sve, "`SQRDMLAH <Zda>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE2).";
    SveSqrdmlsh => Sqrdmlsh, Sve, "`SQRDMLSH <Zda>.<T>, <Zn>.<T>, <Zm>.<T>` (SVE2).";

    // --- SME (Scalable Matrix Extension, FEAT_SME) ---
    Smstart => Smstart, Sme, "`SMSTART {<option>}` (enable Streaming SVE / ZA; MSR PSTATE).";
    Smstop => Smstop, Sme, "`SMSTOP {<option>}` (disable Streaming SVE / ZA; MSR PSTATE).";
    // MOVA — move between an SVE Z register and a ZA-tile slice (both directions).
    SmeMovaZToTile => Mova, Sme, "`MOVA <ZAd><HV>.<T>[<Ws>,#imm], <Pg>/M, <Zn>.<T>` (SME, vector to ZA tile).";

    SmeFmopaH => Fmopa, Sme, "`FMOPA <ZAda>.S, <Pn>/M, <Pm>/M, <Zn>.H, <Zm>.H` (SME, FP16-to-FP32).";

    SmeLd1dZa => Ld1d, Sme, "`LD1D <ZAt><HV>.D[<Ws>,#imm], <Pg>/Z, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>,LSL #3}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    SmeLd1qZa => Ld1q, Sme, "`LD1Q <ZAt><HV>.Q[<Ws>], <Pg>/Z, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>,LSL #4}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    SmeSt1bZa => St1b, Sme, "`ST1B <ZAt><HV>.B[<Ws>,#imm], <Pg>, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    SmeSt1hZa => St1h, Sme, "`ST1H <ZAt><HV>.H[<Ws>,#imm], <Pg>, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>,LSL #1}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    SmeSt1wZa => St1w, Sme, "`ST1W <ZAt><HV>.S[<Ws>,#imm], <Pg>, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>,LSL #2}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    SmeSt1dZa => St1d, Sme, "`ST1D <ZAt><HV>.D[<Ws>,#imm], <Pg>, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>,LSL #3}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    SmeSt1qZa => St1q, Sme, "`ST1Q <ZAt><HV>.Q[<Ws>], <Pg>, [<Xn|SP>{, <Xm>,LSL #4}]` (SME ZA-array).";
    // Whole-array ZA load / store (`LDR`/`STR` ZA).
    SmeLdrZa => Ldr, Sme, "`LDR ZA[<Wv>, #imm], [<Xn|SP>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SME, load ZA array vector).";
    SmeStrZa => Str, Sme, "`STR ZA[<Wv>, #imm], [<Xn|SP>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SME, store ZA array vector).";

    // --- AdvSIMD cryptographic instructions (FEAT_AES / FEAT_SHA* / FEAT_SM3/4),
    //     gated by `Feature::Crypto`. These are the NEON scalar/vector crypto
    //     encodings in the SIMD&FP top group (distinct from the SVE2 forms above).
    // AES (two-register, `cryptoaes`): `<Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B`.
    AdvAese => Aese, Crypto, "`AESE <Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B` (AdvSIMD AES encrypt round).";
    AdvAesd => Aesd, Crypto, "`AESD <Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B` (AdvSIMD AES decrypt round).";
    AdvAesmc => Aesmc, Crypto, "`AESMC <Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B` (AdvSIMD AES mix columns).";
    AdvAesimc => Aesimc, Crypto, "`AESIMC <Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B` (AdvSIMD AES inverse mix columns).";
    // SHA1/SHA256 three-register (`cryptosha3`): mixed Q/S/V operands.
    AdvSha1c => Sha1c, Crypto, "`SHA1C <Qd>, <Sn>, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA1 hash, choose).";
    AdvSha1p => Sha1p, Crypto, "`SHA1P <Qd>, <Sn>, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA1 hash, parity).";
    AdvSha1m => Sha1m, Crypto, "`SHA1M <Qd>, <Sn>, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA1 hash, majority).";
    AdvSha1su0 => Sha1su0, Crypto, "`SHA1SU0 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA1 schedule update 0).";
    AdvSha256h => Sha256h, Crypto, "`SHA256H <Qd>, <Qn>, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA256 hash, part 1).";
    AdvSha256h2 => Sha256h2, Crypto, "`SHA256H2 <Qd>, <Qn>, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA256 hash, part 2).";
    AdvSha256su1 => Sha256su1, Crypto, "`SHA256SU1 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA256 schedule update 1).";
    // SHA1/SHA256 two-register (`cryptosha2`).
    AdvSha1h => Sha1h, Crypto, "`SHA1H <Sd>, <Sn>` (AdvSIMD SHA1 fixed rotate).";
    AdvSha1su1 => Sha1su1, Crypto, "`SHA1SU1 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA1 schedule update 1).";
    AdvSha256su0 => Sha256su0, Crypto, "`SHA256SU0 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S` (AdvSIMD SHA256 schedule update 0).";
    // SHA512 / RAX1 / SM3PARTW / SM4EKEY three-register (`cryptosha512_3`).
    AdvSha512h => Sha512h, Crypto, "`SHA512H <Qd>, <Qn>, <Vm>.2D` (AdvSIMD SHA512 hash, part 1).";
    AdvSha512h2 => Sha512h2, Crypto, "`SHA512H2 <Qd>, <Qn>, <Vm>.2D` (AdvSIMD SHA512 hash, part 2).";
    AdvSha512su1 => Sha512su1, Crypto, "`SHA512SU1 <Vd>.2D, <Vn>.2D, <Vm>.2D` (AdvSIMD SHA512 schedule update 1).";
    AdvRax1 => Rax1, Crypto, "`RAX1 <Vd>.2D, <Vn>.2D, <Vm>.2D` (AdvSIMD rotate and exclusive-OR).";
    AdvSm3partw1 => Sm3partw1, Crypto, "`SM3PARTW1 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SM3 schedule, part 1).";
    AdvSm3partw2 => Sm3partw2, Crypto, "`SM3PARTW2 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SM3 schedule, part 2).";
    AdvSm4ekey => Sm4ekey, Crypto, "`SM4EKEY <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.4S` (AdvSIMD SM4 key update).";
    // SHA512SU0 / SM4E two-register (`cryptosha512_2`).
    AdvSha512su0 => Sha512su0, Crypto, "`SHA512SU0 <Vd>.2D, <Vn>.2D` (AdvSIMD SHA512 schedule update 0).";
    AdvSm4e => Sm4e, Crypto, "`SM4E <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S` (AdvSIMD SM4 encrypt).";
    // EOR3 / BCAX / SM3SS1 four-register (`crypto4`).
    AdvEor3 => Eor3, Crypto, "`EOR3 <Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B, <Vm>.16B, <Va>.16B` (AdvSIMD three-way XOR).";
    AdvBcax => Bcax, Crypto, "`BCAX <Vd>.16B, <Vn>.16B, <Vm>.16B, <Va>.16B` (AdvSIMD bit-clear and XOR).";
    AdvSm3ss1 => Sm3ss1, Crypto, "`SM3SS1 <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.4S, <Va>.4S` (AdvSIMD SM3, rotate).";
    // SM3TT* three-register with 2-bit index (`crypto3_imm2`).
    AdvSm3tt1a => Sm3tt1a, Crypto, "`SM3TT1A <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.S[<imm2>]` (AdvSIMD SM3, part 1A).";
    AdvSm3tt1b => Sm3tt1b, Crypto, "`SM3TT1B <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.S[<imm2>]` (AdvSIMD SM3, part 1B).";
    AdvSm3tt2a => Sm3tt2a, Crypto, "`SM3TT2A <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.S[<imm2>]` (AdvSIMD SM3, part 2A).";
    AdvSm3tt2b => Sm3tt2b, Crypto, "`SM3TT2B <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.4S, <Vm>.S[<imm2>]` (AdvSIMD SM3, part 2B).";
    // XAR three-register with 6-bit rotate (`crypto3_imm6`).
    AdvXar => Xar, Crypto, "`XAR <Vd>.2D, <Vn>.2D, <Vm>.2D, #<imm6>` (AdvSIMD XOR and rotate).";

    // --- Base flag manipulation (FEAT_FlagM / FEAT_FlagM2) ---
    Rmif => Rmif, Base, "`RMIF <Xn>, #<shift>, #<mask>` (rotate, mask insert flags).";
    Setf8 => Setf8, Base, "`SETF8 <Wn>` (evaluate 8-bit value into flags).";
    Setf16 => Setf16, Base, "`SETF16 <Wn>` (evaluate 16-bit value into flags).";

    // --- AdvSIMD three-same logical (vector) + two-reg-misc bitwise ---
    AndVec => And, Base, "`AND <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same logical).";
    BicVec => Bic, Base, "`BIC <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same logical).";
    OrrVec => Orr, Base, "`ORR <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same logical; MOV alias when Vn==Vm).";
    OrnVec => Orn, Base, "`ORN <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same logical).";
    EorVec => Eor, Base, "`EOR <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same logical).";
    BslVec => Bsl, Base, "`BSL <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same bitwise select).";
    BitVec => Bit, Base, "`BIT <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same bitwise insert if true).";
    BifVec => Bif, Base, "`BIF <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>, <Vm>.<T>` (AdvSIMD three-same bitwise insert if false).";
    MvnVec => Mvn, Base, "`MVN <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>` (AdvSIMD two-reg-misc NOT; preferred MVN spelling).";
    RbitVec => Rbit, Base, "`RBIT <Vd>.<T>, <Vn>.<T>` (AdvSIMD two-reg-misc reverse bits).";

    // FEAT_CSSC: Common Short Sequence Compression.
    Abs32 => Abs, Cssc, "`ABS <Wd>, <Wn>` (FEAT_CSSC, 32-bit data-processing 1-source).";
    Abs64 => Abs, Cssc, "`ABS <Xd>, <Xn>` (FEAT_CSSC, 64-bit data-processing 1-source).";
    Cnt32 => Cnt, Cssc, "`CNT <Wd>, <Wn>` (FEAT_CSSC, 32-bit population count).";
    Cnt64 => Cnt, Cssc, "`CNT <Xd>, <Xn>` (FEAT_CSSC, 64-bit population count).";
    Ctz32 => Ctz, Cssc, "`CTZ <Wd>, <Wn>` (FEAT_CSSC, 32-bit count trailing zeros).";
    Ctz64 => Ctz, Cssc, "`CTZ <Xd>, <Xn>` (FEAT_CSSC, 64-bit count trailing zeros).";
    SmaxReg32 => Smax, Cssc, "`SMAX <Wd>, <Wn>, <Wm>` (FEAT_CSSC, signed maximum, register).";
    SmaxReg64 => Smax, Cssc, "`SMAX <Xd>, <Xn>, <Xm>` (FEAT_CSSC, signed maximum, register).";
    SminReg32 => Smin, Cssc, "`SMIN <Wd>, <Wn>, <Wm>` (FEAT_CSSC, signed minimum, register).";
    SminReg64 => Smin, Cssc, "`SMIN <Xd>, <Xn>, <Xm>` (FEAT_CSSC, signed minimum, register).";
    UmaxReg32 => Umax, Cssc, "`UMAX <Wd>, <Wn>, <Wm>` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned maximum, register).";
    UmaxReg64 => Umax, Cssc, "`UMAX <Xd>, <Xn>, <Xm>` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned maximum, register).";
    UminReg32 => Umin, Cssc, "`UMIN <Wd>, <Wn>, <Wm>` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned minimum, register).";
    UminReg64 => Umin, Cssc, "`UMIN <Xd>, <Xn>, <Xm>` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned minimum, register).";
    SmaxImm32 => Smax, Cssc, "`SMAX <Wd>, <Wn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, signed maximum, signed imm8).";
    SmaxImm64 => Smax, Cssc, "`SMAX <Xd>, <Xn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, signed maximum, signed imm8).";
    SminImm32 => Smin, Cssc, "`SMIN <Wd>, <Wn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, signed minimum, signed imm8).";
    SminImm64 => Smin, Cssc, "`SMIN <Xd>, <Xn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, signed minimum, signed imm8).";
    UmaxImm32 => Umax, Cssc, "`UMAX <Wd>, <Wn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned maximum, unsigned imm8).";
    UmaxImm64 => Umax, Cssc, "`UMAX <Xd>, <Xn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned maximum, unsigned imm8).";
    UminImm32 => Umin, Cssc, "`UMIN <Wd>, <Wn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned minimum, unsigned imm8).";
    UminImm64 => Umin, Cssc, "`UMIN <Xd>, <Xn>, #imm` (FEAT_CSSC, unsigned minimum, unsigned imm8).";
    Mrrs => Mrrs, D128, "`MRRS <Xt>, <Xt+1>, (<systemreg>|S<op0>_<op1>_<Cn>_<Cm>_<op2>)` (FEAT_D128).";
    Msrr => Msrr, D128, "`MSRR (<systemreg>|S<op0>_<op1>_<Cn>_<Cm>_<op2>), <Xt>, <Xt+1>` (FEAT_D128).";
    Sysp => Sysp, D128, "`SYSP #op1, <Cn>, <Cm>, #op2{, <Xt>, <Xt+1>}` (FEAT_D128, system pair).";
    Tlbip => Tlbip, D128, "`TLBIP <tlbip_op>{, <Xt>, <Xt+1>}` (FEAT_D128, alias of `SYSP`).";

    // --- SME2 multi-vector ZA accumulate / multiply-into-ZA + TMOPA (FEAT_SME2) ---
    SmeBfmlaHHOV2Gg => Bfmla, Sme2, "`bfmla za.h[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, { z0.h, z1.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlaHHOV2Gi => Bfmla, Sme2, "`bfmla za.h[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlaHHOV2Gs => Bfmla, Sme2, "`bfmla za.h[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlaHHOV4Gg => Bfmla, Sme2, "`bfmla za.h[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, { z0.h - z3.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlaHHOV4Gi => Bfmla, Sme2, "`bfmla za.h[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlaHHOV4Gs => Bfmla, Sme2, "`bfmla za.h[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTSi => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1], z0.h, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTSs => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1], z0.h, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTV2Gg => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, { z0.h, z1.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTV2Gi => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTV2Gs => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTV4Gg => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, { z0.h - z3.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTV4Gi => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlalSHTV4Gs => Bfmlal, Sme2, "`bfmlal za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlsHHOV2Gg => Bfmls, Sme2, "`bfmls za.h[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, { z0.h, z1.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlsHHOV2Gi => Bfmls, Sme2, "`bfmls za.h[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlsHHOV2Gs => Bfmls, Sme2, "`bfmls za.h[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlsHHOV4Gg => Bfmls, Sme2, "`bfmls za.h[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, { z0.h - z3.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlsHHOV4Gi => Bfmls, Sme2, "`bfmls za.h[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlsHHOV4Gs => Bfmls, Sme2, "`bfmls za.h[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlslSHTSi => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1], z0.h, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlslSHTSs => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1], z0.h, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlslSHTV2Gg => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, { z0.h, z1.h }` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlslSHTV2Gi => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlslSHTV2Gs => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx2], { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";

    SmeBfmlslSHTV4Gi => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBfmlslSHTV4Gs => Bfmlsl, Sme2, "`bfmlsl za.s[w8, 0:1, vgx4], { z0.h - z3.h }, z0.h` (SME2).";
    SmeBftmopaHH => Bftmopa, Sme2, "`bftmopa za0.h, { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h, z20[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeBftmopaSH => Bftmopa, Sme2, "`bftmopa za0.s, { z0.h, z1.h }, z0.h, z20[0]` (SME2).";
    SmeFmlaDDOV2Gg => Fmla, Sme2, "`fmla za.d[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.d, z1.d }, { z0.d, z1.d }` (SME2).";

    SmeFmlaDDOV2Gs => Fmla, Sme2, "`fmla za.d[w8, 0, vgx2], { z0.d, z1.d }, z0.d` (SME2).";
    SmeFmlaDDOV4Gg => Fmla, Sme2, "`fmla za.d[w8, 0, vgx4], { z0.d - z3.d }, { z0.d - z3.d }` (SME2).";

    Ldbfadda => Ldbfadda, Lsfe, "`LDBFADDA` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfaddl => Ldbfaddl, Lsfe, "`LDBFADDL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfaddal => Ldbfaddal, Lsfe, "`LDBFADDAL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmax => Ldbfmax, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAX` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxa => Ldbfmaxa, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXA` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxl => Ldbfmaxl, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxal => Ldbfmaxal, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXAL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmin => Ldbfmin, Lsfe, "`LDBFMIN` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmina => Ldbfmina, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINA` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfminl => Ldbfminl, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfminal => Ldbfminal, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINAL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxnm => Ldbfmaxnm, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXNM` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxnma => Ldbfmaxnma, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXNMA` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxnml => Ldbfmaxnml, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXNML` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfmaxnmal => Ldbfmaxnmal, Lsfe, "`LDBFMAXNMAL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfminnm => Ldbfminnm, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINNM` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfminnma => Ldbfminnma, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINNMA` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfminnml => Ldbfminnml, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINNML` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Ldbfminnmal => Ldbfminnmal, Lsfe, "`LDBFMINNMAL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfadd => Stbfadd, Lsfe, "`STBFADD` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfaddl => Stbfaddl, Lsfe, "`STBFADDL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfmax => Stbfmax, Lsfe, "`STBFMAX` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfmaxl => Stbfmaxl, Lsfe, "`STBFMAXL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfmin => Stbfmin, Lsfe, "`STBFMIN` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfminl => Stbfminl, Lsfe, "`STBFMINL` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfmaxnm => Stbfmaxnm, Lsfe, "`STBFMAXNM` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfmaxnml => Stbfmaxnml, Lsfe, "`STBFMAXNML` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfminnm => Stbfminnm, Lsfe, "`STBFMINNM` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";
    Stbfminnml => Stbfminnml, Lsfe, "`STBFMINNML` (FEAT_LSFE atomic float in-memory).";

    // --- FEAT_SVE2p1 quadword (.q) contiguous + gather/scatter load/store (G2) ---
    SveLd1qG => Ld1q, Sve2p1, "`LD1Q {<Zt>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Zn>.D{, <Xm>}]` (SVE2.1 gather, quadword).";
    SveSt1qS => St1q, Sve2p1, "`ST1Q {<Zt>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Zn>.D{, <Xm>}]` (SVE2.1 scatter, quadword).";
    SveLd2qSs => Ld2q, Sve2p1, "`LD2Q {<Zt1>.Q, <Zt2>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Xn>, <Xm>, LSL #4]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveLd2qImm => Ld2q, Sve2p1, "`LD2Q {<Zt1>.Q, <Zt2>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Xn>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveLd3qSs => Ld3q, Sve2p1, "`LD3Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt3>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Xn>, <Xm>, LSL #4]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveLd3qImm => Ld3q, Sve2p1, "`LD3Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt3>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Xn>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveLd4qSs => Ld4q, Sve2p1, "`LD4Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt4>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Xn>, <Xm>, LSL #4]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveLd4qImm => Ld4q, Sve2p1, "`LD4Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt4>.Q}, <Pg>/Z, [<Xn>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveSt2qSs => St2q, Sve2p1, "`ST2Q {<Zt1>.Q, <Zt2>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Xn>, <Xm>, LSL #4]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveSt2qImm => St2q, Sve2p1, "`ST2Q {<Zt1>.Q, <Zt2>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Xn>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveSt3qSs => St3q, Sve2p1, "`ST3Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt3>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Xn>, <Xm>, LSL #4]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveSt3qImm => St3q, Sve2p1, "`ST3Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt3>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Xn>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveSt4qSs => St4q, Sve2p1, "`ST4Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt4>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Xn>, <Xm>, LSL #4]` (SVE2.1).";
    SveSt4qImm => St4q, Sve2p1, "`ST4Q {<Zt1>.Q-<Zt4>.Q}, <Pg>, [<Xn>{, #imm, MUL VL}]` (SVE2.1).";

    // --- FEAT_SVE2p1 REVD zeroing (G2) ---
    SveRevdZpzZero => Revd, Sve2p1, "`REVD <Zd>.Q, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.Q` (SVE2.1 reverse 64-bit doublewords, zeroing).";

    // --- FEAT_SVE2p1 WHILE predicate-pair / predicate-as-counter (G2) ---
    SveWhilePair => Whilege, Sve2p1, "`WHILE<cc> {<Pd1>.<T>, <Pd2>.<T>}, <Xn>, <Xm>` (SVE2.1 predicate pair).";
    SveWhilePn => Whilege, Sve2p1, "`WHILE<cc> <PNd>.<T>, <Xn>, <Xm>, VLx{2,4}` (SVE2.1 predicate-as-counter).";

    // --- FEAT_SVE2p1 FP unary predicated convert/round, zeroing /z (G2) ---
    SveFrintnZ => Frintn, Sve2p1, "`FRINTN <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrintpZ => Frintp, Sve2p1, "`FRINTP <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrintmZ => Frintm, Sve2p1, "`FRINTM <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrintzZ => Frintz, Sve2p1, "`FRINTZ <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrintaZ => Frinta, Sve2p1, "`FRINTA <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrintxZ => Frintx, Sve2p1, "`FRINTX <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrintiZ => Frinti, Sve2p1, "`FRINTI <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFrecpxZ => Frecpx, Sve2p1, "`FRECPX <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFsqrtZ => Fsqrt, Sve2p1, "`FSQRT <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFcvtZ => Fcvt, Sve2p1, "`FCVT <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFcvtxZ => Fcvtx, Sve2p1, "`FCVTX <Zd>.S, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.D` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveScvtfZ => Scvtf, Sve2p1, "`SCVTF <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveUcvtfZ => Ucvtf, Sve2p1, "`UCVTF <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFcvtzsZ => Fcvtzs, Sve2p1, "`FCVTZS <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFcvtzuZ => Fcvtzu, Sve2p1, "`FCVTZU <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveBfcvtZ => Bfcvt, Sve2p1, "`BFCVT <Zd>.H, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.S` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";
    SveFlogbZ => Flogb, Sve2p1, "`FLOGB <Zd>.<T>, <Pg>/Z, <Zn>.<T>` (SVE2.1 zeroing).";

    // --- SME2 LUT (ZT0 lookup table) — FEAT_LUT / SME2 (G3) ---
    SmeLuti2Zt => Luti2, Lut, "`LUTI2 {<Zd>.<T>...}, ZT0, <Zn>[<index>]` (SME2 ZT0 lookup, 2-bit indices; 1/2/4-reg `.B`/`.H`/`.S`).";
    SmeLuti4Zt => Luti4, Lut, "`LUTI4 {<Zd>.<T>...}, ZT0, <Zn>[<index>]` (SME2 ZT0 lookup, 4-bit indices; 1/2/4-reg `.B`/`.H`/`.S`).";

    // --- SME2 move multi-vectors to/from ZA tile slice group — FEAT_SME2 (G3) ---
    SmeMovaMultiZToTile => Mov, Sme2, "`MOV ZA<tile><HV>.<T>[<Ws>, <off>:<off+N-1>], {<Zn>...}` (SME2, vectors to ZA tile slice).";
    SmeMovaMultiTileToZ => Mov, Sme2, "`MOV {<Zd>...}, ZA<tile><HV>.<T>[<Ws>, <off>:<off+N-1>]` (SME2, ZA tile slice to vectors).";
    SmeMovazMultiTileToZ => Movaz, Sme2, "`MOVAZ {<Zd>...}, ZA<tile><HV>.<T>[<Ws>, <off>:<off+N-1>]` (SME2, ZA tile slice to vectors, zeroing).";

    // --- NEON FP matrix-multiply-accumulate (three-register, lo=111011, Q=1) ---
    FmmlaVecF16F32 => Fmmla, F16f32mm, "`FMMLA <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.8H, <Vm>.8H` (FEAT_F16F32MM, FP16→FP32 matrix).";
    FmmlaVecF16 => Fmmla, F16mm, "`FMMLA <Vd>.8H, <Vn>.8H, <Vm>.8H` (FEAT_F16MM, non-widening FP16 matrix).";
    FmmlaVecF8F16 => Fmmla, F8f16mm, "`FMMLA <Vd>.8H, <Vn>.16B, <Vm>.16B` (FEAT_F8F16MM, FP8→FP16 matrix).";
    FmmlaVecF8F32 => Fmmla, F8f32mm, "`FMMLA <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.16B, <Vm>.16B` (FEAT_F8F32MM, FP8→FP32 matrix).";
    BfmmlaVec => Bfmmla, Bf16, "`BFMMLA <Vd>.4S, <Vn>.8H, <Vm>.8H` (FEAT_BF16, NEON BF16 matrix).";
}

impl Code {
    /// `true` if this encoding belongs to the base ISA (no extension gate).
    #[inline]
    pub const fn is_base(self) -> bool {
        matches!(self.feature(), Feature::Base)
    }
}

impl Default for Code {
    #[inline]
    fn default() -> Self {
        Code::Invalid
    }
}

/// Human-readable instruction name, independent of operand width / specific
/// encoding.
///
/// Use for high-level category queries ("is this a branch?") without matching
/// thousands of [`Code`] arms. The canonical lowercase UAL spelling is returned
/// by [`Mnemonic::name`].
///
/// This catalog is the comprehensive base-ISA A64 instruction-name set: the
/// integer, branch, system, load/store and base FP/SIMD instructions, plus the
/// aliases the ARM ARM lists as distinct mnemonics (e.g. `mov`, `cmp`, `cmn`,
/// `tst`, `neg`, `mul`, `lsl`, `ror`, `sxtb`, `bfi`, `ubfx`, `nop`, `ret`, ...).
#[repr(u16)]
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
#[non_exhaustive]
pub enum Mnemonic {
    /// No / invalid mnemonic.
    Invalid = 0,

    /// `ADD`.
    Add,
    /// `SUB`.
    Sub,
    /// `LDR`.
    Ldr,
    /// `STR`.
    Str,
    /// `B`.
    B,
    /// `BL`.
    Bl,
    /// `MOVZ`.
    Movz,
    /// `REVD`.
    Revd,
    /// `ADC`.
    Adc,
    /// `ADCS`.
    Adcs,
    /// `ADDS`.
    Adds,
    /// `SUBS`.
    Subs,
    /// `SBC`.
    Sbc,
    /// `SBCS`.
    Sbcs,
    /// `ADR`.
    Adr,
    /// `ADRP`.
    Adrp,
    /// `NEG`.
    Neg,
    /// `NEGS`.
    Negs,
    /// `NGC`.
    Ngc,
    /// `NGCS`.
    Ngcs,
    /// `CMP`.
    Cmp,
    /// `CMN`.
    Cmn,
    /// `MOV`.
    Mov,
    /// `MOVN`.
    Movn,
    /// `MOVK`.
    Movk,
    /// `AND`.
    And,
    /// `ANDS`.
    Ands,
    /// `ORR`.
    Orr,
    /// `ORN`.
    Orn,
    /// `EOR`.
    Eor,
    /// `EON`.
    Eon,
    /// `BIC`.
    Bic,
    /// `BICS`.
    Bics,
    /// `TST`.
    Tst,
    /// `MVN`.
    Mvn,
    /// `SBFM`.
    Sbfm,
    /// `BFM`.
    Bfm,
    /// `UBFM`.
    Ubfm,
    /// `SBFX`.
    Sbfx,
    /// `SBFIZ`.
    Sbfiz,
    /// `BFI`.
    Bfi,
    /// `BFXIL`.
    Bfxil,
    /// `BFC`.
    Bfc,
    /// `UBFX`.
    Ubfx,
    /// `UBFIZ`.
    Ubfiz,
    /// `EXTR`.
    Extr,
    /// `LSL`.
    Lsl,
    /// `LSR`.
    Lsr,
    /// `ASR`.
    Asr,
    /// `ROR`.
    Ror,
    /// `LSLV`.
    Lslv,
    /// `LSRV`.
    Lsrv,
    /// `ASRV`.
    Asrv,
    /// `RORV`.
    Rorv,
    /// `SXTB`.
    Sxtb,
    /// `SXTH`.
    Sxth,
    /// `SXTW`.
    Sxtw,
    /// `UXTB`.
    Uxtb,
    /// `UXTH`.
    Uxth,
    /// `CSEL`.
    Csel,
    /// `CSINC`.
    Csinc,
    /// `CSINV`.
    Csinv,
    /// `CSNEG`.
    Csneg,
    /// `CSET`.
    Cset,
    /// `CSETM`.
    Csetm,
    /// `CINC`.
    Cinc,
    /// `CINV`.
    Cinv,
    /// `CNEG`.
    Cneg,
    /// `CCMN`.
    Ccmn,
    /// `CCMP`.
    Ccmp,
    /// `RBIT`.
    Rbit,
    /// `REV16`.
    Rev16,
    /// `REV`.
    Rev,
    /// `REV32`.
    Rev32,
    /// `CLZ`.
    Clz,
    /// `CLS`.
    Cls,
    /// `UDIV`.
    Udiv,
    /// `SDIV`.
    Sdiv,
    /// `CRC32B`.
    Crc32b,
    /// `CRC32H`.
    Crc32h,
    /// `CRC32W`.
    Crc32w,
    /// `CRC32X`.
    Crc32x,
    /// `CRC32CB`.
    Crc32cb,
    /// `CRC32CH`.
    Crc32ch,
    /// `CRC32CW`.
    Crc32cw,
    /// `CRC32CX`.
    Crc32cx,
    /// `MADD`.
    Madd,
    /// `MSUB`.
    Msub,
    /// `MUL`.
    Mul,
    /// `MNEG`.
    Mneg,
    /// `SMADDL`.
    Smaddl,
    /// `SMSUBL`.
    Smsubl,
    /// `SMULL`.
    Smull,
    /// `SMNEGL`.
    Smnegl,
    /// `SMULH`.
    Smulh,
    /// `UMADDL`.
    Umaddl,
    /// `UMSUBL`.
    Umsubl,
    /// `UMULL`.
    Umull,
    /// `UMNEGL`.
    Umnegl,
    /// `UMULH`.
    Umulh,
    /// `BR`.

    /// `BLR`.
    Blr,
    /// `RET`.
    Ret,
    /// `ERET`.

    /// `DRPS`.

    /// `SM3SS1` (SM3 hash, rotate).

    /// `SM3TT1A` (SM3 hash, part 1, variant A).
    Sm3tt1a,
    /// `SM3TT1B` (SM3 hash, part 1, variant B).
    Sm3tt1b,
    /// `SM3TT2A` (SM3 hash, part 2, variant A).
    Sm3tt2a,
    /// `SM3TT2B` (SM3 hash, part 2, variant B).
    Sm3tt2b,
    /// `SM3PARTW1` (SM3 schedule update, part 1).
    Sm3partw1,
    /// `SM3PARTW2` (SM3 schedule update, part 2).
    Sm3partw2,

    // --- Base flag manipulation (FEAT_FlagM / FEAT_FlagM2) ---
    /// `RMIF` (rotate, mask insert flags).
    Rmif,
    /// `SETF8` (evaluate into flags, 8-bit).
    Setf8,
    /// `SETF16` (evaluate into flags, 16-bit).
    Setf16,

    // --- SME (Scalable Matrix Extension) ---
    /// `SMSTART` (enable Streaming SVE / ZA, SME PSTATE).
    Smstart,
    /// `SMSTOP` (disable Streaming SVE / ZA, SME PSTATE).
    Smstop,
    /// `MOVA` (SME move vector to/from ZA tile slice).
    Mova,
    /// `FMOPA` (SME floating-point outer product and accumulate).
    Fmopa,
    /// `FMOPS` (SME floating-point outer product and subtract).
    Fmops,
    /// `BFMOPA` (SME BFloat16 outer product and accumulate).
    Bfmopa,
    /// `BFMOPS` (SME BFloat16 outer product and subtract).
    Bfmops,
    /// `SMOPA` (SME signed integer outer product and accumulate).
    Smopa,
    /// `SMOPS` (SME signed integer outer product and subtract).
    Smops,
    /// `UMOPA` (SME unsigned integer outer product and accumulate).
    Umopa,
    /// `UMOPS` (SME unsigned integer outer product and subtract).
    Umops,
    /// `SUMOPA` (SME signed-by-unsigned integer outer product and accumulate).
    Sumopa,
    /// `SUMOPS` (SME signed-by-unsigned integer outer product and subtract).
    Sumops,
    /// `USMOPA` (SME unsigned-by-signed integer outer product and accumulate).
    Usmopa,
    /// `USMOPS` (SME unsigned-by-signed integer outer product and subtract).
    Usmops,
    /// `ADDHA` (SME add horizontally vector elements to ZA tile).
    Addha,
    /// `ADDVA` (SME add vertically vector elements to ZA tile).
    Addva,
    /// `ZERO` (SME zero a list of 64-bit element ZA tiles).
    Zero,
    /// `LD1Q` (SME load 128-bit ZA-array vector — also SVE2.1).
    Ld1q,
    /// `ST1Q` (SME store 128-bit ZA-array vector — also SVE2.1).
    St1q,
    /// `BIT` (AdvSIMD bitwise insert if true).
    Bit,
    /// `BIF` (AdvSIMD bitwise insert if false).
    Bif,
    /// `CTZ` (count trailing zeros, FEAT_CSSC).
    Ctz,
    /// `MRRS` (read 128-bit system-register pair, FEAT_D128).
    Mrrs,
    /// `MSRR` (write 128-bit system-register pair, FEAT_D128).
    Msrr,
    /// `SYSP` (system pair operation, FEAT_D128).
    Sysp,
    /// `TLBIP` (TLB invalidate pair, alias of `SYSP`, FEAT_D128).
    Tlbip,
    /// `SMLALL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Smlall,
    /// `SMLSLL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Smlsll,
    /// `UMLALL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Umlall,
    /// `UMLSLL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Umlsll,
    /// `USMLALL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Usmlall,
    /// `SUMLALL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Sumlall,
    /// `FMLALL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Fmlall,
    /// `BFMLA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Bfmla,
    /// `BFMLS` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Bfmls,
    /// `BFMUL` (SVE2 BF16, FEAT_SVE_B16B16).
    Bfmul,
    /// `BFMLAL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Bfmlal,
    /// `BFMLSL` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Bfmlsl,
    /// `FTMOPA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Ftmopa,
    /// `STMOPA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Stmopa,
    /// `BFTMOPA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Bftmopa,
    /// `UTMOPA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Utmopa,
    /// `SUTMOPA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Sutmopa,
    /// `USTMOPA` (SME2 multi-vector).
    Ustmopa,
    /// `ZIPQ1` (SVE2.1 128-bit-segment interleave, low halves).
    Zipq1,
    /// `ZIPQ2` (SVE2.1 128-bit-segment interleave, high halves).
    Zipq2,
    /// `UZPQ1` (SVE2.1 128-bit-segment deinterleave, even elements).
    Uzpq1,
    /// `UZPQ2` (SVE2.1 128-bit-segment deinterleave, odd elements).
    Uzpq2,
    /// `TBLQ` (SVE2.1 128-bit-segment table lookup).
    Tblq,
    /// `TBXQ` (SVE2.1 128-bit-segment table lookup with base).
    Tbxq,
    /// `ADDPT` (FEAT_CPA checked pointer-arithmetic add).
    Addpt,
    /// `SUBPT` (FEAT_CPA checked pointer-arithmetic subtract).
    Subpt,
    /// `MADDPT` (FEAT_CPA checked pointer-arithmetic multiply-add).
    Maddpt,
    /// `MSUBPT` (FEAT_CPA checked pointer-arithmetic multiply-subtract).
    Msubpt,
    /// `CBGT` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if greater than, signed).
    Cbgt,
    /// `CBGE` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if greater than or equal, signed).
    Cbge,
    /// `CBHI` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if higher, unsigned).
    Cbhi,
    /// `CBHS` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if higher or same, unsigned).
    Cbhs,
    /// `CBEQ` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if equal).
    Cbeq,
    /// `CBNE` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if not equal).
    Cbne,
    /// `CBLT` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if less than, signed; immediate).
    Cblt,
    /// `CBLO` (FEAT_CMPBR compare-and-branch if lower, unsigned; immediate).
    Cblo,
    /// `CBBGT` (FEAT_CMPBR byte compare-and-branch if greater than, signed).
    Cbbgt,
    /// `CBBGE` (FEAT_CMPBR byte compare-and-branch if greater or equal, signed).
    Cbbge,
    /// `CBBHI` (FEAT_CMPBR byte compare-and-branch if higher, unsigned).
    Cbbhi,
    /// `CBBHS` (FEAT_CMPBR byte compare-and-branch if higher or same, unsigned).
    Cbbhs,
    /// `CBBEQ` (FEAT_CMPBR byte compare-and-branch if equal).
    Cbbeq,
    /// `CBBNE` (FEAT_CMPBR byte compare-and-branch if not equal).
    Cbbne,
    /// `CBHGT` (FEAT_CMPBR halfword compare-and-branch if greater than, signed).
    Cbhgt,
    /// `CBHGE` (FEAT_CMPBR halfword compare-and-branch if greater/equal, signed).
    Cbhge,
    /// `CBHHI` (FEAT_CMPBR halfword compare-and-branch if higher, unsigned).
    Cbhhi,
    /// `CBHHS` (FEAT_CMPBR halfword compare-and-branch if higher or same).
    Cbhhs,
    /// `CBHEQ` (FEAT_CMPBR halfword compare-and-branch if equal).
    Cbheq,
    /// `CBHNE` (FEAT_CMPBR halfword compare-and-branch if not equal).
    Cbhne,
    /// `FDOT` (Advanced SIMD FP8 dot product, to single/half precision).
    Fdot,
    /// `FMLALLBB` (Advanced SIMD FP8 widening ×4 multiply-add, bottom-bottom).
    Fmlallbb,
    /// `FMLALLBT` (Advanced SIMD FP8 widening ×4 multiply-add, bottom-top).
    Fmlallbt,
    /// `FMLALLTB` (Advanced SIMD FP8 widening ×4 multiply-add, top-bottom).
    Fmlalltb,
    /// `FMLALLTT` (Advanced SIMD FP8 widening ×4 multiply-add, top-top).
    Fmlalltt,
    /// `FVDOT` (SME2 multi-vector FP16 vertical dot product into ZA).
    Fvdot,
    /// `BFVDOT` (SME2 multi-vector BF16 vertical dot product into ZA).
    Bfvdot,
    /// `UVDOT` (SME2 multi-vector unsigned vertical dot product into ZA).
    Uvdot,
    /// `SVDOT` (SME2 multi-vector signed vertical dot product into ZA).
    Svdot,
    /// `SUVDOT` (SME2 multi-vector signed-by-unsigned vertical dot product into ZA).
    Suvdot,
    /// `USVDOT` (SME2 multi-vector unsigned-by-signed vertical dot product into ZA).
    Usvdot,
    /// `FVDOTB` (SME2 FP8 multi-vector vertical dot product into ZA, bottom).
    Fvdotb,
    /// `FVDOTT` (SME2 FP8 multi-vector vertical dot product into ZA, top).
    Fvdott,
    /// `LDTXR` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged load-exclusive register).
    Ldtxr,
    /// `LDATXR` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged load-acquire-exclusive register).
    Ldatxr,
    /// `STTXR` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged store-exclusive register).
    Sttxr,
    /// `STLTXR` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged store-release-exclusive register).
    Stltxr,
    /// `CAST` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap).
    Cast,
    /// `CASAT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap, acquire).
    Casat,
    /// `CASLT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap, release).
    Caslt,
    /// `CASALT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap, acquire-release).
    Casalt,
    /// `CASPT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap pair).
    Caspt,
    /// `CASPAT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap pair, acquire).
    Caspat,
    /// `CASPLT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap pair, release).
    Casplt,
    /// `CASPALT` (FEAT_LSUI unprivileged compare-and-swap pair, acquire-release).
    Caspalt,
    /// `ADDSVL` (SME streaming-mode add multiple of streaming SVE vector length).
    Addsvl,
    /// `ADDSPL` (SME streaming-mode add multiple of streaming SVE predicate length).
    Addspl,
    /// `RDSVL` (SME read streaming SVE vector length, scaled immediate).
    Rdsvl,
    /// `SQRSHR` (SME2 multi-vector saturating rounding shift right narrow).
    Sqrshr,
    /// `UQRSHR` (SME2 multi-vector unsigned saturating rounding shift right narrow).
    Uqrshr,
    /// `SQRSHRU` (SME2 multi-vector signed→unsigned saturating rounding shift right narrow).
    Sqrshru,
    // --- FEAT_LSFE atomic floating-point in-memory (G4) ---
    Ldfadd, Ldfadda, Ldfaddl, Ldfaddal, Ldfmax, Ldfmaxa, Ldfmaxl, Ldfmaxal,
    Ldfmin, Ldfmina, Ldfminl, Ldfminal, Ldfmaxnm, Ldfmaxnma, Ldfmaxnml, Ldfmaxnmal,
    Ldfminnm, Ldfminnma, Ldfminnml, Ldfminnmal, Stfadd, Stfaddl, Stfmax, Stfmaxl,
    Stfmin, Stfminl, Stfmaxnm, Stfmaxnml, Stfminnm, Stfminnml, Ldbfadd, Ldbfadda,
    Ldbfaddl, Ldbfaddal, Ldbfmax, Ldbfmaxa, Ldbfmaxl, Ldbfmaxal, Ldbfmin, Ldbfmina,
    Ldbfminl, Ldbfminal, Ldbfmaxnm, Ldbfmaxnma, Ldbfmaxnml, Ldbfmaxnmal, Ldbfminnm, Ldbfminnma,
    Ldbfminnml, Ldbfminnmal, Stbfadd, Stbfaddl, Stbfmax, Stbfmaxl, Stbfmin, Stbfminl,
    Stbfmaxnm, Stbfmaxnml, Stbfminnm, Stbfminnml,
    // --- FEAT_SVE2p1 quadword (.q) structured load/store (G2) ---
    // (`Ld1q`/`St1q` mnemonics already exist for the SME ZA-array forms.)
    /// `LD2Q` (SVE2.1 two-register structured load, quadword).
    Ld2q,
    /// `LD3Q` (SVE2.1 three-register structured load, quadword).
    Ld3q,
    /// `LD4Q` (SVE2.1 four-register structured load, quadword).
    Ld4q,
    /// `ST2Q` (SVE2.1 two-register structured store, quadword).
    St2q,
    /// `ST3Q` (SVE2.1 three-register structured store, quadword).
    St3q,
    /// `ST4Q` (SVE2.1 four-register structured store, quadword).
    St4q,
    // --- SME2 ZA tile move (G3) ---
    /// `MOVAZ` (SME2 move ZA tile slice group to vectors, zeroing).
    Movaz,
}

impl Mnemonic {
    /// The canonical lowercase spelling (`"add"`, `"ldr"`, ...), a
    /// `&'static str` from the `const` name table. Zero allocation.
    #[inline]
    pub const fn name(self) -> &'static str {
        crate::tables::names::mnemonic_name(self)
    }
}

impl Default for Mnemonic {
    #[inline]
    fn default() -> Self {
        Mnemonic::Invalid
    }
}
